title: Now open source: our Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZKP) libraries for age assurance

title: Mark Zuckerberg wants Meta to launch its own prediction market | TechCrunch
description: The app would be independent of Meta's other social media offerings, although sources told the NYT that those social sites could direct users to engagement with the app.
